company: Virginia Electric and Power Company (Dominion Energy Virginia)
company_raw: Virginia Electric and Power Company (Dominion Energy Virginia)
source_note: Final Order granting Virginia Electric and Power Company (Dominion Energy Virginia) a certificate of public convenience and necessity (CPCN) to construct and operate the ~944 MW Chesterfield Energy Reliability Center and related transmission, with Rider CERC cost recovery under Va. Code § 56-585.1 A 6, Case No. PUR-2025-00037, Virginia State Corporation Commission, entered at Richmond November 25, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: SCC DocketSearch, document www.scc.virginia.gov/docketsearch/DOCS/89g501!.PDF.
